sentences.translation: Djevojčica se probudila i tražila pržena jaja.
sentences.translationEn: The little girl woke up and asked for fried eggs.

sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: U redu, donjet ću ti ih.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Alright, I will make them for you.

sentences.translation: Pržila je jaja na ulju i dodala sol.
sentences.translationEn: She fried the eggs in oil and added salt.

sentences.translation: Djevojčica je s apetitom pojela jaja.
sentences.translationEn: The little girl ate the eggs with appetite.
